headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson had 30 points and nine assists, Josh Hart added 17 points and 12 rebounds, and the New York Knicks beat the Orlando Magic 106-100 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson, Hart lead the Knicks to a 106-100 victory over the Magic

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 30 points, Derrick White scored 14 of his 27 in the first quarter and the Boston Celtics beat Toronto 121-113 on Sunday, holding on late after blowing a 23-point lead in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown scores 30 as Celtics blow 23-point lead, hold on to beat Raptors 121-113

headlines.description: — Jamal Murray scored 34 points, Nikola Jokic finished with 28 points, 11 assists and nine rebounds and the Denver Nuggets held on to defeat the Charlotte Hornets 115-106 on Sunday night to extend their franchise record to road winning streak to 10...

headlines.description: — Santi Aldama scored 22 points, Jaylen Wells and Kentavious Caldwell-Pope added 17 each and the Memphis Grizzlies built a big first-half lead in a 19-96 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aldama scores 22 points, Grizzlies build big lead in 119-96 win over Trail Blazers

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Chicago Bulls

headlines.description: — Brandin Podziemski scored 21 points off the bench, Jimmy Butler added 19 in his return to the lineup and the injury-depleted Golden State Warriors beat the Chicago Bulls 123-91 on Sunday night to extend the longest active losing streak in the NBA.
headlines.shortLinkText: Podziemski scores 21, Warriors beat Bulls 123-91 for Chicago's 7th straight loss

headlines.description: — LeBron James hit a late go-ahead 3-pointer and scored 29 points, Luka Doncic had a triple-double and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Philadelphia 76ers 112-108 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: James hits go-ahead 3 and scores 29 points, Doncic has triple-double in Lakers' win over 76ers

headlines.description: — Chet Holmgren and Jalen Williams each scored 25 points and the defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder improved to 23-1 with their 15th straight victory, routing the Utah Jazz 131-101 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder improve to 23-1 with 15th straight victory, routing Jazz 131-101
